title: Number Select Field Type
description: Schema for number input field with increment/decrement controls

max.description: Maximum allowed value. Defaults to Number.MAX_VALUE in the UI.

step.description: Amount added or subtracted by each arrow click/long-press tick. Defaults to 1.

options.description: Numeric formatting options passed to react-number-format

fixedDecimalScale.description: Always show decimal places up to decimalScale

allowNegative.description: Allow negative values. Defaults to true when min is below 0.

decimalScale.description: Maximum number of decimal places. Defaults to 2.

onChange.description: Actions to execute when field value changes

onBlur.description: Actions to execute when field loses focus

onFocus.description: Actions to execute when field gains focus
